full_text:
Wu Guan еҗіз“ҳ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Guan (еҗіз“ҳ)was born in Chen Commandery. Governed Wei commandery as a model administrator. Wu Guan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
